def get_data(filters):
    """Fetch all Component Masters for the project with procurement data"""

    # Get all Component Masters for the project
    component_masters = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            pcm.name as component_master,
            pcm.project,
            COALESCE(pcm.cost_center, cc.name) as cost_center,
            pcm.machine_code,
            pcm.item_code,
            pcm.item_name,
            pcm.description,
            pcm.make_or_buy,
            pcm.total_qty_limit,
            pcm.component_image,
            pcm.parent_component,
            item.stock_uom
        FROM `tabProject Component Master` pcm
        LEFT JOIN `tabItem` item ON item.name = pcm.item_code
        LEFT JOIN `tabCost Center` cc ON cc.custom_machine_code = pcm.machine_code
        WHERE pcm.project = %(project)s
        ORDER BY cost_center, pcm.item_code
    """, filters, as_dict=True)

    if not component_masters:
        return []

    # Build parent lookup for M-Code and G-Code traversal (fallback)
    parent_lookup = build_parent_lookup(filters.get("project"))

    # Build bom_usage lookup for multi-parent M-Code and G-Code
    bom_usage_lookup = build_bom_usage_lookup(filters.get("project"))

    # Build procurement data maps
    procurement_data = get_procurement_data(filters.get("project"))

    data = []
    for pcm in component_masters:
        # Get M-code and G-code(s) using new structure
        m_code, g_code = get_m_code_g_code(pcm.component_master, bom_usage_lookup, parent_lookup)

        row = {
            "component_master": pcm.component_master,
            "project": pcm.project,
            "machine_code": pcm.machine_code,
            "cost_center": pcm.cost_center,
            "m_code": m_code,
            "g_code": g_code,
            "component_image": pcm.component_image,
            "item_code": pcm.item_code,
            "item_name": pcm.item_name,
            "description": pcm.description,
            "make_or_buy": pcm.make_or_buy,
            "total_qty_limit": pcm.total_qty_limit,
            "stock_uom": pcm.stock_uom,
        }

        # Add Material Request data
        if filters.get("show_mr"):
            mr_data = procurement_data.get("mr", {}).get(pcm.component_master, {})
            row.update({
                "mr_nos": mr_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "mr_qty": mr_data.get("qty", 0),
                "mr_eta": mr_data.get("eta"),
                "pending_mr_qty": (pcm.total_qty_limit or 0) - (mr_data.get("qty") or 0),
            })

        # Add RFQ & Supplier Quotation data
        if filters.get("show_rfq"):
            sq_data = procurement_data.get("sq", {}).get(pcm.component_master, {})
            vendors = sq_data.get("vendors", [])

            # Populate vendor columns (up to 4 vendors)
            for i in range(1, 5):
                if i <= len(vendors):
                    v = vendors[i-1]
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_name"] = v.get("supplier")
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_rate"] = v.get("rate")
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_total"] = v.get("amount")
                else:
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_name"] = None
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_rate"] = None
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_total"] = None

            # Comparison columns
            row["lowest_vendor"] = sq_data.get("lowest_vendor")
            row["lowest_rate"] = sq_data.get("lowest_rate")
            row["decided_vendor"] = sq_data.get("decided_vendor")
            row["decided_rate"] = sq_data.get("decided_rate")

        # Add Purchase Order & Delivery data
        if filters.get("show_po"):
            po_data = procurement_data.get("po", {}).get(pcm.component_master, {})
            pr_data = procurement_data.get("pr", {}).get(pcm.component_master, {})

            po_qty = po_data.get("qty") or 0
            delivery_qty = pr_data.get("qty") or 0

            row.update({
                "po_nos": po_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "po_date": po_data.get("date"),
                "po_qty": po_qty,
                "pending_po_qty": (pcm.total_qty_limit or 0) - po_qty,
                "grn_nos": pr_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "delivery_qty": delivery_qty,
                "delivery_date": pr_data.get("date"),
                "pending_delivery_qty": po_qty - delivery_qty,
                "delivery_status": get_delivery_status(po_qty, delivery_qty),
            })

        data.append(row)

    return data

def get_data(filters):
    """
    Fetch data for Project Tracking Report.

    Key concept: Each row = one BOM usage path (M-code/G-code combination).
    For multi-parent items (same raw material under multiple G-codes),
    we show SEPARATE rows for each path.

    Procurement is tracked per BOM path using:
    - MR Item.bom_no = bom_usage.parent_bom
    """
    project = filters.get("project")

    # 1. Get all bom_usage rows - one row per M-code/G-code path
    bom_usage_rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cbu.parent as component_master,
            cbu.parent_bom,
            cbu.m_code,
            cbu.g_code,
            cbu.qty_per_unit,
            cbu.total_qty_required,
            pcm.project,
            pcm.machine_code,
            pcm.item_code,
            pcm.item_name,
            pcm.description,
            pcm.make_or_buy,
            pcm.total_qty_limit,
            pcm.component_image,
            COALESCE(pcm.cost_center, cc.name) as cost_center,
            item.stock_uom
        FROM `tabComponent BOM Usage` cbu
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cbu.parent
        LEFT JOIN `tabItem` item ON item.name = pcm.item_code
        LEFT JOIN `tabCost Center` cc ON cc.custom_machine_code = pcm.machine_code
        WHERE pcm.project = %(project)s
        ORDER BY cbu.m_code, cbu.g_code, pcm.item_code
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    # 2. Get CMs WITHOUT bom_usage (M-codes themselves, loose items)
    #    These use header-level m_code, g_code
    cms_without_bom_usage = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            pcm.name as component_master,
            NULL as parent_bom,
            pcm.m_code,
            pcm.g_code,
            NULL as qty_per_unit,
            NULL as total_qty_required,
            pcm.project,
            pcm.machine_code,
            pcm.item_code,
            pcm.item_name,
            pcm.description,
            pcm.make_or_buy,
            pcm.total_qty_limit,
            pcm.component_image,
            COALESCE(pcm.cost_center, cc.name) as cost_center,
            item.stock_uom
        FROM `tabProject Component Master` pcm
        LEFT JOIN `tabItem` item ON item.name = pcm.item_code
        LEFT JOIN `tabCost Center` cc ON cc.custom_machine_code = pcm.machine_code
        WHERE pcm.project = %(project)s
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM `tabComponent BOM Usage` cbu
            WHERE cbu.parent = pcm.name
        )
        ORDER BY pcm.m_code, pcm.g_code, pcm.item_code
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    # 3. Combine all rows
    all_rows = list(bom_usage_rows) + list(cms_without_bom_usage)

    if not all_rows:
        return []

    # 4. Build procurement data maps keyed by (item_code, bom_no)
    procurement_data = get_procurement_data_by_bom(project)

    data = []
    for row in all_rows:
        # Key for procurement lookup: (item_code, parent_bom)
        procurement_key = (row.item_code, row.parent_bom)

        # For items without bom_usage, fall back to item_code-only lookup
        procurement_key_fallback = (row.item_code, None)

        result_row = {
            "component_master": row.component_master,
            "project": row.project,
            "machine_code": row.machine_code,
            "cost_center": row.cost_center,
            "m_code": row.m_code,
            "g_code": row.g_code,
            "component_image": row.component_image,
            "item_code": row.item_code,
            "item_name": row.item_name,
            "description": row.description,
            "make_or_buy": row.make_or_buy,
            # Use total_qty_required from bom_usage if available, else total_qty_limit
            "total_qty_limit": row.total_qty_required or row.total_qty_limit,
            "stock_uom": row.stock_uom,
        }

        # Determine qty for pending calculations
        base_qty = row.total_qty_required or row.total_qty_limit or 0

        # Add Material Request data
        if filters.get("show_mr"):
            mr_data = (procurement_data.get("mr", {}).get(procurement_key) or
                      procurement_data.get("mr", {}).get(procurement_key_fallback) or {})
            mr_qty = mr_data.get("qty") or 0
            result_row.update({
                "mr_nos": mr_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "mr_qty": mr_qty,
                "mr_eta": mr_data.get("eta"),
                "pending_mr_qty": base_qty - mr_qty,
            })

        # Add RFQ & Supplier Quotation data
        if filters.get("show_rfq"):
            sq_data = (procurement_data.get("sq", {}).get(procurement_key) or
                      procurement_data.get("sq", {}).get(procurement_key_fallback) or {})
            vendors = sq_data.get("vendors", [])

            # Populate vendor columns (up to 4 vendors)
            for i in range(1, 5):
                if i <= len(vendors):
                    v = vendors[i-1]
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_name"] = v.get("supplier")
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_rate"] = v.get("rate")
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_total"] = v.get("amount")
                else:
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_name"] = None
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_rate"] = None
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_total"] = None

            # Comparison columns
            result_row["lowest_vendor"] = sq_data.get("lowest_vendor")
            result_row["lowest_rate"] = sq_data.get("lowest_rate")
            result_row["decided_vendor"] = sq_data.get("decided_vendor")
            result_row["decided_rate"] = sq_data.get("decided_rate")

        # Add Purchase Order & Delivery data
        if filters.get("show_po"):
            po_data = (procurement_data.get("po", {}).get(procurement_key) or
                      procurement_data.get("po", {}).get(procurement_key_fallback) or {})
            pr_data = (procurement_data.get("pr", {}).get(procurement_key) or
                      procurement_data.get("pr", {}).get(procurement_key_fallback) or {})

            po_qty = po_data.get("qty") or 0
            delivery_qty = pr_data.get("qty") or 0

            result_row.update({
                "po_nos": po_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "po_date": po_data.get("date"),
                "po_qty": po_qty,
                "pending_po_qty": base_qty - po_qty,
                "grn_nos": pr_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "delivery_qty": delivery_qty,
                "delivery_date": pr_data.get("date"),
                "pending_delivery_qty": po_qty - delivery_qty,
                "delivery_status": get_delivery_status(po_qty, delivery_qty),
            })

        data.append(result_row)

    return data

                "pending_delivery_qty": po_qty - delivery_qty,
                "delivery_status": get_delivery_status(po_qty, delivery_qty),
            })

        data.append(result_row)

    return data

# Copyright (c) 2026, Bharatbodh and contributors
# For license information, please see license.txt

import frappe
from frappe import _


def execute(filters=None):
    filters = filters or {}

    if not filters.get("project"):
        return [], []

    columns = get_columns(filters)
    data = get_data(filters)

    return columns, data


def get_columns(filters):
    """Build columns based on filter toggles"""

    # Section 1: Default columns (always visible)
    columns = [
        {"label": _("Project"), "fieldname": "project", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Project", "width": 120},
        {"label": _("Machine Code"), "fieldname": "machine_code", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
        {"label": _("WBS Code"), "fieldname": "cost_center", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Cost Center", "width": 150},
        {"label": _("M-Code"), "fieldname": "m_code", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
        {"label": _("G-Code"), "fieldname": "g_code", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
        {"label": _("Image"), "fieldname": "component_image", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 80},
        {"label": _("Item No"), "fieldname": "item_code", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Item", "width": 150},
        {"label": _("Item Name"), "fieldname": "item_name", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"label": _("Description"), "fieldname": "description", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"label": _("Make/Buy"), "fieldname": "make_or_buy", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 80},
        {"label": _("Qty"), "fieldname": "total_qty_limit", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 80},
        {"label": _("UOM"), "fieldname": "stock_uom", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 70},
    ]

    # Section 4: Material Request columns
    if filters.get("show_mr"):
        columns += [
            {"label": _("MR No"), "fieldname": "mr_nos", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 150},
            {"label": _("MR Qty"), "fieldname": "mr_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 80},
            {"label": _("MR ETA"), "fieldname": "mr_eta", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("Pending for MR"), "fieldname": "pending_mr_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 100},
        ]

    # Section 5: RFQ & Supplier Quotation columns
    if filters.get("show_rfq"):
        # Vendor 1-4 columns (4 vendors x 4 fields = 16 columns)
        for i in range(1, 5):
            columns += [
                {"label": _(f"Vendor {i}"), "fieldname": f"vendor_{i}_name", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
                {"label": _(f"V{i} Rate"), "fieldname": f"vendor_{i}_rate", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 90},
                {"label": _(f"V{i} Total"), "fieldname": f"vendor_{i}_total", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 100},
            ]

        # Comparison columns
        columns += [
            {"label": _("Lowest Vendor"), "fieldname": "lowest_vendor", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
            {"label": _("Lowest Rate"), "fieldname": "lowest_rate", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 90},
            {"label": _("Decided Vendor"), "fieldname": "decided_vendor", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
            {"label": _("Decided Rate"), "fieldname": "decided_rate", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 90},
        ]

    # Section 6: Purchase Order & Delivery columns
    if filters.get("show_po"):
        columns += [
            {"label": _("PO No"), "fieldname": "po_nos", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 150},
            {"label": _("PO Date"), "fieldname": "po_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("PO Qty"), "fieldname": "po_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 80},
            {"label": _("Pending for PO"), "fieldname": "pending_po_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("GRN No"), "fieldname": "grn_nos", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 150},
            {"label": _("Delivery Qty"), "fieldname": "delivery_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("Delivery Date"), "fieldname": "delivery_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("Pending Delivery"), "fieldname": "pending_delivery_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 110},
            {"label": _("Delivery Status"), "fieldname": "delivery_status", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
        ]

    return columns


def get_data(filters):
    """Fetch all Component Masters for the project with procurement data"""

    # Get all Component Masters for the project
    component_masters = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            pcm.name as component_master,
            pcm.project,
            COALESCE(pcm.cost_center, cc.name) as cost_center,
            pcm.machine_code,
            pcm.item_code,
            pcm.item_name,
            pcm.description,
            pcm.make_or_buy,
            pcm.total_qty_limit,
            pcm.component_image,
            pcm.parent_component,
            item.stock_uom
        FROM `tabProject Component Master` pcm
        LEFT JOIN `tabItem` item ON item.name = pcm.item_code
        LEFT JOIN `tabCost Center` cc ON cc.custom_machine_code = pcm.machine_code
        WHERE pcm.project = %(project)s
        ORDER BY cost_center, pcm.item_code
    """, filters, as_dict=True)

    if not component_masters:
        return []

    # Build parent lookup for M-Code and G-Code traversal (fallback)
    parent_lookup = build_parent_lookup(filters.get("project"))

    # Build bom_usage lookup for multi-parent M-Code and G-Code
    bom_usage_lookup = build_bom_usage_lookup(filters.get("project"))

    # Build procurement data maps
    procurement_data = get_procurement_data(filters.get("project"))

    data = []
    for pcm in component_masters:
        # Get M-code and G-code(s) using new structure
        m_code, g_code = get_m_code_g_code(pcm.component_master, bom_usage_lookup, parent_lookup)

        row = {
            "component_master": pcm.component_master,
            "project": pcm.project,
            "machine_code": pcm.machine_code,
            "cost_center": pcm.cost_center,
            "m_code": m_code,
            "g_code": g_code,
            "component_image": pcm.component_image,
            "item_code": pcm.item_code,
            "item_name": pcm.item_name,
            "description": pcm.description,
            "make_or_buy": pcm.make_or_buy,
            "total_qty_limit": pcm.total_qty_limit,
            "stock_uom": pcm.stock_uom,
        }

        # Add Material Request data
        if filters.get("show_mr"):
            mr_data = procurement_data.get("mr", {}).get(pcm.component_master, {})
            row.update({
                "mr_nos": mr_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "mr_qty": mr_data.get("qty", 0),
                "mr_eta": mr_data.get("eta"),
                "pending_mr_qty": (pcm.total_qty_limit or 0) - (mr_data.get("qty") or 0),
            })

        # Add RFQ & Supplier Quotation data
        if filters.get("show_rfq"):
            sq_data = procurement_data.get("sq", {}).get(pcm.component_master, {})
            vendors = sq_data.get("vendors", [])

            # Populate vendor columns (up to 4 vendors)
            for i in range(1, 5):
                if i <= len(vendors):
                    v = vendors[i-1]
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_name"] = v.get("supplier")
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_rate"] = v.get("rate")
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_total"] = v.get("amount")
                else:
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_name"] = None
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_rate"] = None
                    row[f"vendor_{i}_total"] = None

            # Comparison columns
            row["lowest_vendor"] = sq_data.get("lowest_vendor")
            row["lowest_rate"] = sq_data.get("lowest_rate")
            row["decided_vendor"] = sq_data.get("decided_vendor")
            row["decided_rate"] = sq_data.get("decided_rate")

        # Add Purchase Order & Delivery data
        if filters.get("show_po"):
            po_data = procurement_data.get("po", {}).get(pcm.component_master, {})
            pr_data = procurement_data.get("pr", {}).get(pcm.component_master, {})

            po_qty = po_data.get("qty") or 0
            delivery_qty = pr_data.get("qty") or 0

            row.update({
                "po_nos": po_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "po_date": po_data.get("date"),
                "po_qty": po_qty,
                "pending_po_qty": (pcm.total_qty_limit or 0) - po_qty,
                "grn_nos": pr_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "delivery_qty": delivery_qty,
                "delivery_date": pr_data.get("date"),
                "pending_delivery_qty": po_qty - delivery_qty,
                "delivery_status": get_delivery_status(po_qty, delivery_qty),
            })

        data.append(row)

    return data


def build_parent_lookup(project):
    """Build a lookup dict for parent traversal: {component_master: {item_code, parent_component, m_code, g_code}}"""
    records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT name, item_code, parent_component, m_code, g_code
        FROM `tabProject Component Master`
        WHERE project = %s
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    return {r.name: {
        "item_code": r.item_code,
        "parent_component": r.parent_component,
        "m_code": r.m_code,
        "g_code": r.g_code
    } for r in records}


def build_bom_usage_lookup(project):
    """
    Build a lookup of bom_usage data for each Component Master.
    Returns: {cm_name: [{"m_code": ..., "g_code": ...}, ...]}

    This captures multi-parent scenarios where an item appears under multiple G-codes.
    """
    records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cbu.parent as cm_name,
            cbu.m_code,
            cbu.g_code
        FROM `tabComponent BOM Usage` cbu
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cbu.parent
        WHERE pcm.project = %s
        AND (cbu.m_code IS NOT NULL OR cbu.g_code IS NOT NULL)
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    lookup = {}
    for r in records:
        if r.cm_name not in lookup:
            lookup[r.cm_name] = []
        lookup[r.cm_name].append({"m_code": r.m_code, "g_code": r.g_code})

    return lookup


def get_m_code_g_code(component_master, bom_usage_lookup, parent_lookup):
    """
    Get M-code and G-code(s) for a Component Master.

    Priority:
    1. bom_usage child table (for multi-parent items) - returns comma-separated G-codes
    2. Header fields (m_code, g_code on CM)
    3. Traverse parent_component chain (legacy fallback)

    Returns:
        tuple: (m_code, g_code_string)
    """
    # Check bom_usage first (handles multi-parent items)
    bom_usage_rows = bom_usage_lookup.get(component_master, [])

    if bom_usage_rows:
        m_codes = set()
        g_codes = set()

        for row in bom_usage_rows:
            if row.get("m_code"):
                m_codes.add(row["m_code"])
            if row.get("g_code"):
                g_codes.add(row["g_code"])

        # M-code should be same across all rows (one M per machine)
        m_code = list(m_codes)[0] if m_codes else None

        # G-codes may differ (multi-parent) - show as comma-separated
        g_code = ", ".join(sorted(g_codes)) if g_codes else None

        if m_code or g_code:
            return m_code, g_code

    # Fallback to header fields
    cm_data = parent_lookup.get(component_master, {})
    if cm_data.get("m_code") or cm_data.get("g_code"):
        return cm_data.get("m_code"), cm_data.get("g_code")

    # Legacy fallback: traverse parent_component chain
    m_code = get_ancestor_code(component_master, "M", parent_lookup)
    g_code = get_ancestor_code(component_master, "G", parent_lookup)

    return m_code, g_code


def get_ancestor_code(component_master, prefix, parent_lookup, max_depth=20):
    """
    Traverse up the parent_component chain to find an ancestor
    whose item_code starts with the given prefix (e.g., 'M' or 'G')
    """
    current = component_master
    depth = 0

    while current and depth < max_depth:
        data = parent_lookup.get(current)
        if not data:
            break

        item_code = data.get("item_code") or ""
        if item_code.startswith(prefix):
            return item_code

        current = data.get("parent_component")
        depth += 1

    return None


def get_procurement_data(project):
    """Fetch all procurement records and build lookup maps"""

    procurement_records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cpr.parent as component_master,
            cpr.document_type,
            cpr.document_name,
            cpr.quantity,
            cpr.rate,
            cpr.amount
        FROM `tabComponent Procurement Record` cpr
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cpr.parent
        WHERE pcm.project = %s
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    # Initialize result structure
    result = {
        "mr": {},   # Material Request
        "sq": {},   # Supplier Quotation
        "po": {},   # Purchase Order
        "pr": {},   # Purchase Receipt
    }

    # Group records by component_master and document_type
    for rec in procurement_records:
        cm = rec.component_master
        doc_type = rec.document_type

        if doc_type == "Material Request":
            if cm not in result["mr"]:
                result["mr"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "eta": None}
            result["mr"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["mr"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0

        elif doc_type == "Supplier Quotation":
            if cm not in result["sq"]:
                result["sq"][cm] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
            result["sq"][cm]["vendors"].append({
                "supplier": get_supplier_from_sq(rec.document_name),
                "rate": rec.rate,
                "amount": rec.amount,
            })

        elif doc_type == "Purchase Order":
            if cm not in result["po"]:
                result["po"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
            result["po"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["po"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0
            # Get decided vendor info
            if cm not in result["sq"]:
                result["sq"][cm] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
            result["sq"][cm]["decided_vendor"] = get_supplier_from_po(rec.document_name)
            result["sq"][cm]["decided_rate"] = rec.rate

        elif doc_type == "Purchase Receipt":
            if cm not in result["pr"]:
                result["pr"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
            result["pr"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["pr"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0

    # Post-process: join doc_names, find lowest vendor, get dates
    for cm, data in result["mr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["eta"] = get_mr_eta(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    for cm, data in result["sq"].items():
        # Sort vendors by rate and find lowest
        if data["vendors"]:
            data["vendors"].sort(key=lambda x: x.get("rate") or float("inf"))
            data["lowest_vendor"] = data["vendors"][0].get("supplier")
            data["lowest_rate"] = data["vendors"][0].get("rate")

    for cm, data in result["po"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["date"] = get_po_date(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    for cm, data in result["pr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["date"] = get_pr_date(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    return result


def get_supplier_from_sq(sq_name):
    """Get supplier name from Supplier Quotation"""
    if not sq_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Supplier Quotation", sq_name, "supplier")


def get_supplier_from_po(po_name):
    """Get supplier name from Purchase Order"""
    if not po_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Purchase Order", po_name, "supplier")


def get_mr_eta(mr_name):
    """Get schedule_date from Material Request Item"""
    if not mr_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Material Request", mr_name, "schedule_date")


def get_po_date(po_name):
    """Get transaction_date from Purchase Order"""
    if not po_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Purchase Order", po_name, "transaction_date")


def get_pr_date(pr_name):
    """Get posting_date from Purchase Receipt"""
    if not pr_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Purchase Receipt", pr_name, "posting_date")


def get_delivery_status(po_qty, delivery_qty):
    """Calculate delivery status based on PO qty vs delivered qty"""
    if not po_qty:
        return "Pending"
    if delivery_qty >= po_qty:
        return "Completed"
    if delivery_qty > 0:
        return "Partial"
    return "Pending"

content.text:
Good question. Let me explain my reasoning:

**The Problem:**
- One Component Master per item per project (e.g., one CM for A001)
- But A001 can appear under multiple G-codes (G001, G002) with separate bom_usage rows
- Report needs to show SEPARATE rows: `M001|G001|A001` and `M001|G002|A001`
- Each row needs its OWN procurement data (not total for A001)

**How procurement links to BOM path:**
- When you create MR using "Get Items from BOM" for A001 under G001:
  - MR Item.bom_no = BOM-D001 (parent D-code's BOM)
- When you create MR for A001 under G002:
  - MR Item.bom_no = BOM-D002 (different parent D-code's BOM)

**bom_usage also has:**
- `parent_bom` = same D-code BOM

**So the match is:** `MR Item.bom_no = bom_usage.parent_bom`

**Example:**
```
bom_usage row 1: A001, parent_bom=BOM-D001, m_code=M001, g_code=G001
bom_usage row 2: A001, parent_bom=BOM-D002, m_code=M001, g_code=G002

MR-001: A001, bom_no=BOM-D001, qty=10  → matches row 1
MR-002: A001, bom_no=BOM-D002, qty=5   → matches row 2
```

**Report output:**
```
M001 | G001 | A001 | MR Qty: 10 | Pending: X
M001 | G002 | A001 | MR Qty: 5  | Pending: Y
```

Is this understanding correct, or am I missing something about how procurement should be tracked?

def build_parent_lookup(project):
    """Build a lookup dict for parent traversal: {component_master: {item_code, parent_component, m_code, g_code}}"""
    records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT name, item_code, parent_component, m_code, g_code
        FROM `tabProject Component Master`
        WHERE project = %s
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    return {r.name: {
        "item_code": r.item_code,
        "parent_component": r.parent_component,
        "m_code": r.m_code,
        "g_code": r.g_code
    } for r in records}


def build_bom_usage_lookup(project):
    """
    Build a lookup of bom_usage data for each Component Master.
    Returns: {cm_name: [{"m_code": ..., "g_code": ...}, ...]}

    This captures multi-parent scenarios where an item appears under multiple G-codes.
    """
    records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cbu.parent as cm_name,
            cbu.m_code,
            cbu.g_code
        FROM `tabComponent BOM Usage` cbu
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cbu.parent
        WHERE pcm.project = %s
        AND (cbu.m_code IS NOT NULL OR cbu.g_code IS NOT NULL)
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    lookup = {}
    for r in records:
        if r.cm_name not in lookup:
            lookup[r.cm_name] = []
        lookup[r.cm_name].append({"m_code": r.m_code, "g_code": r.g_code})

    return lookup


def get_m_code_g_code(component_master, bom_usage_lookup, parent_lookup):
    """
    Get M-code and G-code(s) for a Component Master.

    Priority:
    1. bom_usage child table (for multi-parent items) - returns comma-separated G-codes
    2. Header fields (m_code, g_code on CM)
    3. Traverse parent_component chain (legacy fallback)

    Returns:
        tuple: (m_code, g_code_string)
    """
    # Check bom_usage first (handles multi-parent items)
    bom_usage_rows = bom_usage_lookup.get(component_master, [])

    if bom_usage_rows:
        m_codes = set()
        g_codes = set()

        for row in bom_usage_rows:
            if row.get("m_code"):
                m_codes.add(row["m_code"])
            if row.get("g_code"):
                g_codes.add(row["g_code"])

        # M-code should be same across all rows (one M per machine)
        m_code = list(m_codes)[0] if m_codes else None

        # G-codes may differ (multi-parent) - show as comma-separated
        g_code = ", ".join(sorted(g_codes)) if g_codes else None

        if m_code or g_code:
            return m_code, g_code

    # Fallback to header fields
    cm_data = parent_lookup.get(component_master, {})
    if cm_data.get("m_code") or cm_data.get("g_code"):
        return cm_data.get("m_code"), cm_data.get("g_code")

    # Legacy fallback: traverse parent_component chain
    m_code = get_ancestor_code(component_master, "M", parent_lookup)
    g_code = get_ancestor_code(component_master, "G", parent_lookup)

    return m_code, g_code


def get_ancestor_code(component_master, prefix, parent_lookup, max_depth=20):
    """
    Traverse up the parent_component chain to find an ancestor
    whose item_code starts with the given prefix (e.g., 'M' or 'G')
    """
    current = component_master
    depth = 0

    while current and depth < max_depth:
        data = parent_lookup.get(current)
        if not data:
            break

        item_code = data.get("item_code") or ""
        if item_code.startswith(prefix):
            return item_code

        current = data.get("parent_component")
        depth += 1

    return None


def get_procurement_data(project):
    """Fetch all procurement records and build lookup maps"""

    procurement_records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cpr.parent as component_master,
            cpr.document_type,
            cpr.document_name,
            cpr.quantity,
            cpr.rate,
            cpr.amount
        FROM `tabComponent Procurement Record` cpr
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cpr.parent
        WHERE pcm.project = %s
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    # Initialize result structure
    result = {
        "mr": {},   # Material Request
        "sq": {},   # Supplier Quotation
        "po": {},   # Purchase Order
        "pr": {},   # Purchase Receipt
    }

    # Group records by component_master and document_type
    for rec in procurement_records:
        cm = rec.component_master
        doc_type = rec.document_type

        if doc_type == "Material Request":
            if cm not in result["mr"]:
                result["mr"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "eta": None}
            result["mr"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["mr"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0

        elif doc_type == "Supplier Quotation":
            if cm not in result["sq"]:
                result["sq"][cm] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
            result["sq"][cm]["vendors"].append({
                "supplier": get_supplier_from_sq(rec.document_name),
                "rate": rec.rate,
                "amount": rec.amount,
            })

        elif doc_type == "Purchase Order":
            if cm not in result["po"]:
                result["po"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
            result["po"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["po"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0
            # Get decided vendor info
            if cm not in result["sq"]:
                result["sq"][cm] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
            result["sq"][cm]["decided_vendor"] = get_supplier_from_po(rec.document_name)
            result["sq"][cm]["decided_rate"] = rec.rate

        elif doc_type == "Purchase Receipt":
            if cm not in result["pr"]:
                result["pr"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
            result["pr"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["pr"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0

    # Post-process: join doc_names, find lowest vendor, get dates
    for cm, data in result["mr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["eta"] = get_mr_eta(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    for cm, data in result["sq"].items():
        # Sort vendors by rate and find lowest
        if data["vendors"]:
            data["vendors"].sort(key=lambda x: x.get("rate") or float("inf"))
            data["lowest_vendor"] = data["vendors"][0].get("supplier")
            data["lowest_rate"] = data["vendors"][0].get("rate")

    for cm, data in result["po"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["date"] = get_po_date(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    for cm, data in result["pr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["date"] = get_pr_date(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    return result

def get_procurement_data_by_bom(project):
    """
    Fetch procurement data keyed by (item_code, bom_no).

    This allows tracking procurement per BOM path:
    - MR Item has bom_no = parent D-code's BOM
    - bom_usage has parent_bom = same D-code's BOM
    - Match: MR Item.bom_no = bom_usage.parent_bom

    Returns:
        dict: {
            "mr": {(item_code, bom_no): {"doc_names": "...", "qty": X, "eta": date}, ...},
            "sq": {(item_code, bom_no): {"vendors": [...], ...}, ...},
            "po": {(item_code, bom_no): {"doc_names": "...", "qty": X, "date": date}, ...},
            "pr": {(item_code, bom_no): {"doc_names": "...", "qty": X, "date": date}, ...},
        }
    """
    result = {
        "mr": {},   # Material Request
        "sq": {},   # Supplier Quotation
        "po": {},   # Purchase Order
        "pr": {},   # Purchase Receipt
    }

    # ========== Material Request ==========
    # Query MR Items with bom_no for the project
    mr_items = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            mri.item_code,
            mri.bom_no,
            mri.qty,
            mr.name as mr_no,
            mr.schedule_date
        FROM `tabMaterial Request Item` mri
        INNER JOIN `tabMaterial Request` mr ON mr.name = mri.parent
        WHERE mri.project = %(project)s
        AND mr.docstatus = 1
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    for item in mr_items:
        key = (item.item_code, item.bom_no)
        if key not in result["mr"]:
            result["mr"][key] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "eta": None}
        result["mr"][key]["doc_names"].append(item.mr_no)
        result["mr"][key]["qty"] += item.qty or 0
        if not result["mr"][key]["eta"] and item.schedule_date:
            result["mr"][key]["eta"] = item.schedule_date

    # ========== Purchase Order ==========
    # PO Items linked via MR → PO flow, get bom_no from linked MR Item
    po_items = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            poi.item_code,
            poi.qty,
            poi.rate,
            po.name as po_no,
            po.transaction_date,
            po.supplier,
            mri.bom_no
        FROM `tabPurchase Order Item` poi
        INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Order` po ON po.name = poi.parent
        LEFT JOIN `tabMaterial Request Item` mri ON mri.name = poi.material_request_item
        WHERE poi.project = %(project)s
        AND po.docstatus = 1
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    for item in po_items:
        key = (item.item_code, item.bom_no)
        if key not in result["po"]:
            result["po"][key] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
        result["po"][key]["doc_names"].append(item.po_no)
        result["po"][key]["qty"] += item.qty or 0
        if not result["po"][key]["date"] and item.transaction_date:
            result["po"][key]["date"] = item.transaction_date

        # Also track decided vendor in SQ data
        if key not in result["sq"]:
            result["sq"][key] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
        result["sq"][key]["decided_vendor"] = item.supplier
        result["sq"][key]["decided_rate"] = item.rate

    # ========== Purchase Receipt (Delivery) ==========
    # PR Items linked via PO → PR flow
    pr_items = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            pri.item_code,
            pri.qty,
            pr.name as pr_no,
            pr.posting_date,
            mri.bom_no
        FROM `tabPurchase Receipt Item` pri
        INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Receipt` pr ON pr.name = pri.parent
        LEFT JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` poi ON poi.name = pri.purchase_order_item
        LEFT JOIN `tabMaterial Request Item` mri ON mri.name = poi.material_request_item
        WHERE pri.project = %(project)s
        AND pr.docstatus = 1
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    for item in pr_items:
        key = (item.item_code, item.bom_no)
        if key not in result["pr"]:
            result["pr"][key] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
        result["pr"][key]["doc_names"].append(item.pr_no)
        result["pr"][key]["qty"] += item.qty or 0
        if not result["pr"][key]["date"] and item.posting_date:
            result["pr"][key]["date"] = item.posting_date

    # ========== Supplier Quotation ==========
    # SQ Items - link via RFQ → SQ flow if available
    sq_items = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            sqi.item_code,
            sqi.qty,
            sqi.rate,
            sqi.amount,
            sq.name as sq_no,
            sq.supplier,
            mri.bom_no
        FROM `tabSupplier Quotation Item` sqi
        INNER JOIN `tabSupplier Quotation` sq ON sq.name = sqi.parent
        LEFT JOIN `tabRequest for Quotation Item` rfqi ON rfqi.name = sqi.request_for_quotation_item
        LEFT JOIN `tabMaterial Request Item` mri ON mri.name = rfqi.material_request_item
        WHERE sqi.project = %(project)s
        AND sq.docstatus = 1
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    for item in sq_items:
        key = (item.item_code, item.bom_no)
        if key not in result["sq"]:
            result["sq"][key] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
        result["sq"][key]["vendors"].append({
            "supplier": item.supplier,
            "rate": item.rate,
            "amount": item.amount,
        })

    # ========== Post-process ==========
    # Join doc_names and find lowest vendor
    for key, data in result["mr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))

    for key, data in result["sq"].items():
        if data["vendors"]:
            data["vendors"].sort(key=lambda x: x.get("rate") or float("inf"))
            data["lowest_vendor"] = data["vendors"][0].get("supplier")
            data["lowest_rate"] = data["vendors"][0].get("rate")

    for key, data in result["po"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))

    for key, data in result["pr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))

    return result

def build_parent_lookup(project):
    """Build a lookup dict for parent traversal: {component_master: {item_code, parent_component, m_code, g_code}}"""
    records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT name, item_code, parent_component, m_code, g_code
        FROM `tabProject Component Master`
        WHERE project = %s
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    return {r.name: {
        "item_code": r.item_code,
        "parent_component": r.parent_component,
        "m_code": r.m_code,
        "g_code": r.g_code
    } for r in records}


def build_bom_usage_lookup(project):
    """
    Build a lookup of bom_usage data for each Component Master.
    Returns: {cm_name: [{"m_code": ..., "g_code": ...}, ...]}

    This captures multi-parent scenarios where an item appears under multiple G-codes.
    """
    records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cbu.parent as cm_name,
            cbu.m_code,
            cbu.g_code
        FROM `tabComponent BOM Usage` cbu
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cbu.parent
        WHERE pcm.project = %s
        AND (cbu.m_code IS NOT NULL OR cbu.g_code IS NOT NULL)
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    lookup = {}
    for r in records:
        if r.cm_name not in lookup:
            lookup[r.cm_name] = []
        lookup[r.cm_name].append({"m_code": r.m_code, "g_code": r.g_code})

    return lookup


def get_m_code_g_code(component_master, bom_usage_lookup, parent_lookup):
    """
    Get M-code and G-code(s) for a Component Master.

    Priority:
    1. bom_usage child table (for multi-parent items) - returns comma-separated G-codes
    2. Header fields (m_code, g_code on CM)
    3. Traverse parent_component chain (legacy fallback)

    Returns:
        tuple: (m_code, g_code_string)
    """
    # Check bom_usage first (handles multi-parent items)
    bom_usage_rows = bom_usage_lookup.get(component_master, [])

    if bom_usage_rows:
        m_codes = set()
        g_codes = set()

        for row in bom_usage_rows:
            if row.get("m_code"):
                m_codes.add(row["m_code"])
            if row.get("g_code"):
                g_codes.add(row["g_code"])

        # M-code should be same across all rows (one M per machine)
        m_code = list(m_codes)[0] if m_codes else None

        # G-codes may differ (multi-parent) - show as comma-separated
        g_code = ", ".join(sorted(g_codes)) if g_codes else None

        if m_code or g_code:
            return m_code, g_code

    # Fallback to header fields
    cm_data = parent_lookup.get(component_master, {})
    if cm_data.get("m_code") or cm_data.get("g_code"):
        return cm_data.get("m_code"), cm_data.get("g_code")

    # Legacy fallback: traverse parent_component chain
    m_code = get_ancestor_code(component_master, "M", parent_lookup)
    g_code = get_ancestor_code(component_master, "G", parent_lookup)

    return m_code, g_code


def get_ancestor_code(component_master, prefix, parent_lookup, max_depth=20):
    """
    Traverse up the parent_component chain to find an ancestor
    whose item_code starts with the given prefix (e.g., 'M' or 'G')
    """
    current = component_master
    depth = 0

    while current and depth < max_depth:
        data = parent_lookup.get(current)
        if not data:
            break

        item_code = data.get("item_code") or ""
        if item_code.startswith(prefix):
            return item_code

        current = data.get("parent_component")
        depth += 1

    return None


def get_procurement_data(project):
    """Fetch all procurement records and build lookup maps"""

    procurement_records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cpr.parent as component_master,
            cpr.document_type,
            cpr.document_name,
            cpr.quantity,
            cpr.rate,
            cpr.amount
        FROM `tabComponent Procurement Record` cpr
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cpr.parent
        WHERE pcm.project = %s
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    # Initialize result structure
    result = {
        "mr": {},   # Material Request
        "sq": {},   # Supplier Quotation
        "po": {},   # Purchase Order
        "pr": {},   # Purchase Receipt
    }

    # Group records by component_master and document_type
    for rec in procurement_records:
        cm = rec.component_master
        doc_type = rec.document_type

        if doc_type == "Material Request":
            if cm not in result["mr"]:
                result["mr"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "eta": None}
            result["mr"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["mr"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0

        elif doc_type == "Supplier Quotation":
            if cm not in result["sq"]:
                result["sq"][cm] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
            result["sq"][cm]["vendors"].append({
                "supplier": get_supplier_from_sq(rec.document_name),
                "rate": rec.rate,
                "amount": rec.amount,
            })

        elif doc_type == "Purchase Order":
            if cm not in result["po"]:
                result["po"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
            result["po"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["po"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0
            # Get decided vendor info
            if cm not in result["sq"]:
                result["sq"][cm] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
            result["sq"][cm]["decided_vendor"] = get_supplier_from_po(rec.document_name)
            result["sq"][cm]["decided_rate"] = rec.rate

        elif doc_type == "Purchase Receipt":
            if cm not in result["pr"]:
                result["pr"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
            result["pr"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["pr"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0

    # Post-process: join doc_names, find lowest vendor, get dates
    for cm, data in result["mr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["eta"] = get_mr_eta(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    for cm, data in result["sq"].items():
        # Sort vendors by rate and find lowest
        if data["vendors"]:
            data["vendors"].sort(key=lambda x: x.get("rate") or float("inf"))
            data["lowest_vendor"] = data["vendors"][0].get("supplier")
            data["lowest_rate"] = data["vendors"][0].get("rate")

    for cm, data in result["po"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["date"] = get_po_date(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    for cm, data in result["pr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["date"] = get_pr_date(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    return result

def get_procurement_data_by_bom(project):
    """
    Fetch procurement data keyed by (item_code, bom_no).

    This allows tracking procurement per BOM path:
    - MR Item has bom_no = parent D-code's BOM
    - bom_usage has parent_bom = same D-code's BOM
    - Match: MR Item.bom_no = bom_usage.parent_bom

    Returns:
        dict: {
            "mr": {(item_code, bom_no): {"doc_names": "...", "qty": X, "eta": date}, ...},
            "sq": {(item_code, bom_no): {"vendors": [...], ...}, ...},
            "po": {(item_code, bom_no): {"doc_names": "...", "qty": X, "date": date}, ...},
            "pr": {(item_code, bom_no): {"doc_names": "...", "qty": X, "date": date}, ...},
        }
    """
    result = {
        "mr": {},   # Material Request
        "sq": {},   # Supplier Quotation
        "po": {},   # Purchase Order
        "pr": {},   # Purchase Receipt
    }

    # ========== Material Request ==========
    # Query MR Items with bom_no for the project
    mr_items = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            mri.item_code,
            mri.bom_no,
            mri.qty,
            mr.name as mr_no,
            mr.schedule_date
        FROM `tabMaterial Request Item` mri
        INNER JOIN `tabMaterial Request` mr ON mr.name = mri.parent
        WHERE mri.project = %(project)s
        AND mr.docstatus = 1
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    for item in mr_items:
        key = (item.item_code, item.bom_no)
        if key not in result["mr"]:
            result["mr"][key] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "eta": None}
        result["mr"][key]["doc_names"].append(item.mr_no)
        result["mr"][key]["qty"] += item.qty or 0
        if not result["mr"][key]["eta"] and item.schedule_date:
            result["mr"][key]["eta"] = item.schedule_date

    # ========== Purchase Order ==========
    # PO Items linked via MR → PO flow, get bom_no from linked MR Item
    po_items = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            poi.item_code,
            poi.qty,
            poi.rate,
            po.name as po_no,
            po.transaction_date,
            po.supplier,
            mri.bom_no
        FROM `tabPurchase Order Item` poi
        INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Order` po ON po.name = poi.parent
        LEFT JOIN `tabMaterial Request Item` mri ON mri.name = poi.material_request_item
        WHERE poi.project = %(project)s
        AND po.docstatus = 1
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    for item in po_items:
        key = (item.item_code, item.bom_no)
        if key not in result["po"]:
            result["po"][key] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
        result["po"][key]["doc_names"].append(item.po_no)
        result["po"][key]["qty"] += item.qty or 0
        if not result["po"][key]["date"] and item.transaction_date:
            result["po"][key]["date"] = item.transaction_date

        # Also track decided vendor in SQ data
        if key not in result["sq"]:
            result["sq"][key] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
        result["sq"][key]["decided_vendor"] = item.supplier
        result["sq"][key]["decided_rate"] = item.rate

    # ========== Purchase Receipt (Delivery) ==========
    # PR Items linked via PO → PR flow
    pr_items = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            pri.item_code,
            pri.qty,
            pr.name as pr_no,
            pr.posting_date,
            mri.bom_no
        FROM `tabPurchase Receipt Item` pri
        INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Receipt` pr ON pr.name = pri.parent
        LEFT JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` poi ON poi.name = pri.purchase_order_item
        LEFT JOIN `tabMaterial Request Item` mri ON mri.name = poi.material_request_item
        WHERE pri.project = %(project)s
        AND pr.docstatus = 1
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    for item in pr_items:
        key = (item.item_code, item.bom_no)
        if key not in result["pr"]:
            result["pr"][key] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
        result["pr"][key]["doc_names"].append(item.pr_no)
        result["pr"][key]["qty"] += item.qty or 0
        if not result["pr"][key]["date"] and item.posting_date:
            result["pr"][key]["date"] = item.posting_date

    # ========== Supplier Quotation ==========
    # SQ Items - link via RFQ → SQ flow if available
    sq_items = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            sqi.item_code,
            sqi.qty,
            sqi.rate,
            sqi.amount,
            sq.name as sq_no,
            sq.supplier,
            mri.bom_no
        FROM `tabSupplier Quotation Item` sqi
        INNER JOIN `tabSupplier Quotation` sq ON sq.name = sqi.parent
        LEFT JOIN `tabRequest for Quotation Item` rfqi ON rfqi.name = sqi.request_for_quotation_item
        LEFT JOIN `tabMaterial Request Item` mri ON mri.name = rfqi.material_request_item
        WHERE sqi.project = %(project)s
        AND sq.docstatus = 1
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    for item in sq_items:
        key = (item.item_code, item.bom_no)
        if key not in result["sq"]:
            result["sq"][key] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
        result["sq"][key]["vendors"].append({
            "supplier": item.supplier,
            "rate": item.rate,
            "amount": item.amount,
        })

    # ========== Post-process ==========
    # Join doc_names and find lowest vendor
    for key, data in result["mr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))

    for key, data in result["sq"].items():
        if data["vendors"]:
            data["vendors"].sort(key=lambda x: x.get("rate") or float("inf"))
            data["lowest_vendor"] = data["vendors"][0].get("supplier")
            data["lowest_rate"] = data["vendors"][0].get("rate")

    for key, data in result["po"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))

    for key, data in result["pr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))

    return result

# Copyright (c) 2026, Bharatbodh and contributors
# For license information, please see license.txt

import frappe
from frappe import _


def execute(filters=None):
    filters = filters or {}

    if not filters.get("project"):
        return [], []

    columns = get_columns(filters)
    data = get_data(filters)

    return columns, data


def get_columns(filters):
    """Build columns based on filter toggles"""

    # Section 1: Default columns (always visible)
    columns = [
        {"label": _("Project"), "fieldname": "project", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Project", "width": 120},
        {"label": _("Machine Code"), "fieldname": "machine_code", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
        {"label": _("WBS Code"), "fieldname": "cost_center", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Cost Center", "width": 150},
        {"label": _("M-Code"), "fieldname": "m_code", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
        {"label": _("G-Code"), "fieldname": "g_code", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
        {"label": _("Image"), "fieldname": "component_image", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 80},
        {"label": _("Item No"), "fieldname": "item_code", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Item", "width": 150},
        {"label": _("Item Name"), "fieldname": "item_name", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"label": _("Description"), "fieldname": "description", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"label": _("Make/Buy"), "fieldname": "make_or_buy", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 80},
        {"label": _("Qty"), "fieldname": "total_qty_limit", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 80},
        {"label": _("UOM"), "fieldname": "stock_uom", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 70},
    ]

    # Section 4: Material Request columns
    if filters.get("show_mr"):
        columns += [
            {"label": _("MR No"), "fieldname": "mr_nos", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 150},
            {"label": _("MR Qty"), "fieldname": "mr_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 80},
            {"label": _("MR ETA"), "fieldname": "mr_eta", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("Pending for MR"), "fieldname": "pending_mr_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 100},
        ]

    # Section 5: RFQ & Supplier Quotation columns
    if filters.get("show_rfq"):
        # Vendor 1-4 columns (4 vendors x 4 fields = 16 columns)
        for i in range(1, 5):
            columns += [
                {"label": _(f"Vendor {i}"), "fieldname": f"vendor_{i}_name", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
                {"label": _(f"V{i} Rate"), "fieldname": f"vendor_{i}_rate", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 90},
                {"label": _(f"V{i} Total"), "fieldname": f"vendor_{i}_total", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 100},
            ]

        # Comparison columns
        columns += [
            {"label": _("Lowest Vendor"), "fieldname": "lowest_vendor", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
            {"label": _("Lowest Rate"), "fieldname": "lowest_rate", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 90},
            {"label": _("Decided Vendor"), "fieldname": "decided_vendor", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 120},
            {"label": _("Decided Rate"), "fieldname": "decided_rate", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 90},
        ]

    # Section 6: Purchase Order & Delivery columns
    if filters.get("show_po"):
        columns += [
            {"label": _("PO No"), "fieldname": "po_nos", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 150},
            {"label": _("PO Date"), "fieldname": "po_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("PO Qty"), "fieldname": "po_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 80},
            {"label": _("Pending for PO"), "fieldname": "pending_po_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("GRN No"), "fieldname": "grn_nos", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 150},
            {"label": _("Delivery Qty"), "fieldname": "delivery_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("Delivery Date"), "fieldname": "delivery_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
            {"label": _("Pending Delivery"), "fieldname": "pending_delivery_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 110},
            {"label": _("Delivery Status"), "fieldname": "delivery_status", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
        ]

    return columns


def get_data(filters):
    """
    Fetch data for Project Tracking Report.

    Key concept: Each row = one BOM usage path (M-code/G-code combination).
    For multi-parent items (same raw material under multiple G-codes),
    we show SEPARATE rows for each path.

    Procurement is tracked per BOM path using:
    - MR Item.bom_no = bom_usage.parent_bom
    """
    project = filters.get("project")

    # 1. Get all bom_usage rows - one row per M-code/G-code path
    bom_usage_rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cbu.parent as component_master,
            cbu.parent_bom,
            cbu.m_code,
            cbu.g_code,
            cbu.qty_per_unit,
            cbu.total_qty_required,
            pcm.project,
            pcm.machine_code,
            pcm.item_code,
            pcm.item_name,
            pcm.description,
            pcm.make_or_buy,
            pcm.total_qty_limit,
            pcm.component_image,
            COALESCE(pcm.cost_center, cc.name) as cost_center,
            item.stock_uom
        FROM `tabComponent BOM Usage` cbu
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cbu.parent
        LEFT JOIN `tabItem` item ON item.name = pcm.item_code
        LEFT JOIN `tabCost Center` cc ON cc.custom_machine_code = pcm.machine_code
        WHERE pcm.project = %(project)s
        ORDER BY cbu.m_code, cbu.g_code, pcm.item_code
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    # 2. Get CMs WITHOUT bom_usage (M-codes themselves, loose items)
    #    These use header-level m_code, g_code
    cms_without_bom_usage = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            pcm.name as component_master,
            NULL as parent_bom,
            pcm.m_code,
            pcm.g_code,
            NULL as qty_per_unit,
            NULL as total_qty_required,
            pcm.project,
            pcm.machine_code,
            pcm.item_code,
            pcm.item_name,
            pcm.description,
            pcm.make_or_buy,
            pcm.total_qty_limit,
            pcm.component_image,
            COALESCE(pcm.cost_center, cc.name) as cost_center,
            item.stock_uom
        FROM `tabProject Component Master` pcm
        LEFT JOIN `tabItem` item ON item.name = pcm.item_code
        LEFT JOIN `tabCost Center` cc ON cc.custom_machine_code = pcm.machine_code
        WHERE pcm.project = %(project)s
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM `tabComponent BOM Usage` cbu
            WHERE cbu.parent = pcm.name
        )
        ORDER BY pcm.m_code, pcm.g_code, pcm.item_code
    """, {"project": project}, as_dict=True)

    # 3. Combine all rows
    all_rows = list(bom_usage_rows) + list(cms_without_bom_usage)

    if not all_rows:
        return []

    # 4. Build procurement data maps keyed by (item_code, bom_no)
    procurement_data = get_procurement_data_by_bom(project)

    data = []
    for row in all_rows:
        # Key for procurement lookup: (item_code, parent_bom)
        procurement_key = (row.item_code, row.parent_bom)

        # For items without bom_usage, fall back to item_code-only lookup
        procurement_key_fallback = (row.item_code, None)

        result_row = {
            "component_master": row.component_master,
            "project": row.project,
            "machine_code": row.machine_code,
            "cost_center": row.cost_center,
            "m_code": row.m_code,
            "g_code": row.g_code,
            "component_image": row.component_image,
            "item_code": row.item_code,
            "item_name": row.item_name,
            "description": row.description,
            "make_or_buy": row.make_or_buy,
            # Use total_qty_required from bom_usage if available, else total_qty_limit
            "total_qty_limit": row.total_qty_required or row.total_qty_limit,
            "stock_uom": row.stock_uom,
        }

        # Determine qty for pending calculations
        base_qty = row.total_qty_required or row.total_qty_limit or 0

        # Add Material Request data
        if filters.get("show_mr"):
            mr_data = (procurement_data.get("mr", {}).get(procurement_key) or
                      procurement_data.get("mr", {}).get(procurement_key_fallback) or {})
            mr_qty = mr_data.get("qty") or 0
            result_row.update({
                "mr_nos": mr_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "mr_qty": mr_qty,
                "mr_eta": mr_data.get("eta"),
                "pending_mr_qty": base_qty - mr_qty,
            })

        # Add RFQ & Supplier Quotation data
        if filters.get("show_rfq"):
            sq_data = (procurement_data.get("sq", {}).get(procurement_key) or
                      procurement_data.get("sq", {}).get(procurement_key_fallback) or {})
            vendors = sq_data.get("vendors", [])

            # Populate vendor columns (up to 4 vendors)
            for i in range(1, 5):
                if i <= len(vendors):
                    v = vendors[i-1]
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_name"] = v.get("supplier")
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_rate"] = v.get("rate")
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_total"] = v.get("amount")
                else:
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_name"] = None
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_rate"] = None
                    result_row[f"vendor_{i}_total"] = None

            # Comparison columns
            result_row["lowest_vendor"] = sq_data.get("lowest_vendor")
            result_row["lowest_rate"] = sq_data.get("lowest_rate")
            result_row["decided_vendor"] = sq_data.get("decided_vendor")
            result_row["decided_rate"] = sq_data.get("decided_rate")

        # Add Purchase Order & Delivery data
        if filters.get("show_po"):
            po_data = (procurement_data.get("po", {}).get(procurement_key) or
                      procurement_data.get("po", {}).get(procurement_key_fallback) or {})
            pr_data = (procurement_data.get("pr", {}).get(procurement_key) or
                      procurement_data.get("pr", {}).get(procurement_key_fallback) or {})

            po_qty = po_data.get("qty") or 0
            delivery_qty = pr_data.get("qty") or 0

            result_row.update({
                "po_nos": po_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "po_date": po_data.get("date"),
                "po_qty": po_qty,
                "pending_po_qty": base_qty - po_qty,
                "grn_nos": pr_data.get("doc_names", ""),
                "delivery_qty": delivery_qty,
                "delivery_date": pr_data.get("date"),
                "pending_delivery_qty": po_qty - delivery_qty,
                "delivery_status": get_delivery_status(po_qty, delivery_qty),
            })

        data.append(result_row)

    return data


def build_parent_lookup(project):
    """Build a lookup dict for parent traversal: {component_master: {item_code, parent_component, m_code, g_code}}"""
    records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT name, item_code, parent_component, m_code, g_code
        FROM `tabProject Component Master`
        WHERE project = %s
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    return {r.name: {
        "item_code": r.item_code,
        "parent_component": r.parent_component,
        "m_code": r.m_code,
        "g_code": r.g_code
    } for r in records}


def build_bom_usage_lookup(project):
    """
    Build a lookup of bom_usage data for each Component Master.
    Returns: {cm_name: [{"m_code": ..., "g_code": ...}, ...]}

    This captures multi-parent scenarios where an item appears under multiple G-codes.
    """
    records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cbu.parent as cm_name,
            cbu.m_code,
            cbu.g_code
        FROM `tabComponent BOM Usage` cbu
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cbu.parent
        WHERE pcm.project = %s
        AND (cbu.m_code IS NOT NULL OR cbu.g_code IS NOT NULL)
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    lookup = {}
    for r in records:
        if r.cm_name not in lookup:
            lookup[r.cm_name] = []
        lookup[r.cm_name].append({"m_code": r.m_code, "g_code": r.g_code})

    return lookup


def get_m_code_g_code(component_master, bom_usage_lookup, parent_lookup):
    """
    Get M-code and G-code(s) for a Component Master.

    Priority:
    1. bom_usage child table (for multi-parent items) - returns comma-separated G-codes
    2. Header fields (m_code, g_code on CM)
    3. Traverse parent_component chain (legacy fallback)

    Returns:
        tuple: (m_code, g_code_string)
    """
    # Check bom_usage first (handles multi-parent items)
    bom_usage_rows = bom_usage_lookup.get(component_master, [])

    if bom_usage_rows:
        m_codes = set()
        g_codes = set()

        for row in bom_usage_rows:
            if row.get("m_code"):
                m_codes.add(row["m_code"])
            if row.get("g_code"):
                g_codes.add(row["g_code"])

        # M-code should be same across all rows (one M per machine)
        m_code = list(m_codes)[0] if m_codes else None

        # G-codes may differ (multi-parent) - show as comma-separated
        g_code = ", ".join(sorted(g_codes)) if g_codes else None

        if m_code or g_code:
            return m_code, g_code

    # Fallback to header fields
    cm_data = parent_lookup.get(component_master, {})
    if cm_data.get("m_code") or cm_data.get("g_code"):
        return cm_data.get("m_code"), cm_data.get("g_code")

    # Legacy fallback: traverse parent_component chain
    m_code = get_ancestor_code(component_master, "M", parent_lookup)
    g_code = get_ancestor_code(component_master, "G", parent_lookup)

    return m_code, g_code


def get_ancestor_code(component_master, prefix, parent_lookup, max_depth=20):
    """
    Traverse up the parent_component chain to find an ancestor
    whose item_code starts with the given prefix (e.g., 'M' or 'G')
    """
    current = component_master
    depth = 0

    while current and depth < max_depth:
        data = parent_lookup.get(current)
        if not data:
            break

        item_code = data.get("item_code") or ""
        if item_code.startswith(prefix):
            return item_code

        current = data.get("parent_component")
        depth += 1

    return None


def get_procurement_data(project):
    """Fetch all procurement records and build lookup maps"""

    procurement_records = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            cpr.parent as component_master,
            cpr.document_type,
            cpr.document_name,
            cpr.quantity,
            cpr.rate,
            cpr.amount
        FROM `tabComponent Procurement Record` cpr
        INNER JOIN `tabProject Component Master` pcm ON pcm.name = cpr.parent
        WHERE pcm.project = %s
    """, project, as_dict=True)

    # Initialize result structure
    result = {
        "mr": {},   # Material Request
        "sq": {},   # Supplier Quotation
        "po": {},   # Purchase Order
        "pr": {},   # Purchase Receipt
    }

    # Group records by component_master and document_type
    for rec in procurement_records:
        cm = rec.component_master
        doc_type = rec.document_type

        if doc_type == "Material Request":
            if cm not in result["mr"]:
                result["mr"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "eta": None}
            result["mr"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["mr"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0

        elif doc_type == "Supplier Quotation":
            if cm not in result["sq"]:
                result["sq"][cm] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
            result["sq"][cm]["vendors"].append({
                "supplier": get_supplier_from_sq(rec.document_name),
                "rate": rec.rate,
                "amount": rec.amount,
            })

        elif doc_type == "Purchase Order":
            if cm not in result["po"]:
                result["po"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
            result["po"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["po"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0
            # Get decided vendor info
            if cm not in result["sq"]:
                result["sq"][cm] = {"vendors": [], "lowest_vendor": None, "lowest_rate": None}
            result["sq"][cm]["decided_vendor"] = get_supplier_from_po(rec.document_name)
            result["sq"][cm]["decided_rate"] = rec.rate

        elif doc_type == "Purchase Receipt":
            if cm not in result["pr"]:
                result["pr"][cm] = {"doc_names": [], "qty": 0, "date": None}
            result["pr"][cm]["doc_names"].append(rec.document_name)
            result["pr"][cm]["qty"] += rec.quantity or 0

    # Post-process: join doc_names, find lowest vendor, get dates
    for cm, data in result["mr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["eta"] = get_mr_eta(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    for cm, data in result["sq"].items():
        # Sort vendors by rate and find lowest
        if data["vendors"]:
            data["vendors"].sort(key=lambda x: x.get("rate") or float("inf"))
            data["lowest_vendor"] = data["vendors"][0].get("supplier")
            data["lowest_rate"] = data["vendors"][0].get("rate")

    for cm, data in result["po"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["date"] = get_po_date(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    for cm, data in result["pr"].items():
        data["doc_names"] = ", ".join(list(set(data["doc_names"])))
        data["date"] = get_pr_date(data["doc_names"].split(", ")[0] if data["doc_names"] else None)

    return result


def get_supplier_from_sq(sq_name):
    """Get supplier name from Supplier Quotation"""
    if not sq_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Supplier Quotation", sq_name, "supplier")


def get_supplier_from_po(po_name):
    """Get supplier name from Purchase Order"""
    if not po_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Purchase Order", po_name, "supplier")


def get_mr_eta(mr_name):
    """Get schedule_date from Material Request Item"""
    if not mr_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Material Request", mr_name, "schedule_date")


def get_po_date(po_name):
    """Get transaction_date from Purchase Order"""
    if not po_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Purchase Order", po_name, "transaction_date")


def get_pr_date(pr_name):
    """Get posting_date from Purchase Receipt"""
    if not pr_name:
        return None
    return frappe.db.get_value("Purchase Receipt", pr_name, "posting_date")


def get_delivery_status(po_qty, delivery_qty):
    """Calculate delivery status based on PO qty vs delivered qty"""
    if not po_qty:
        return "Pending"
    if delivery_qty >= po_qty:
        return "Completed"
    if delivery_qty > 0:
        return "Partial"
    return "Pending"
